name: Better Houseware Extra-Large Metallic Folding Dish Rack
description: The metallic coated-steel X-framed Folding Dish Rack from Better Houseware is a fabulous space-saver with 2 levels to hold up to 23 plates or pots and pans above, and room below for bowls, tools and accessories. Specially designed cup/mug/stemware loops lift them out of the way and upside down for optimal drying. It folds flat when not in use.
